hero.title: The scholarship platform built around you.
hero.subtitle: Discover, track, and secure scholarships with AI-matched recommendations and verified consultants — all in one gated workspace.

discovery.title: Smart discovery
discovery.body: Search 100K+ opportunities and see AI match scores personalized to your profile.

tracking.title: In-app tracking
tracking.body: Apply directly or self-track external applications in a single unified kanban.

consultants.title: Verified consultants
consultants.body: Book one-to-one sessions with secure Stripe-held payments and transparent refunds.

community.title: Trusted community
community.body: Real-time 1:1 chat, a moderated forum, and curated resources from alumni and experts.

ready.title: Ready to start?
ready.body: Register in less than a minute. No credit card required.
